description: In this episode of Chewing Glass, hosts discuss the journeys of Elmoy and Richard from Tensor, exploring their backgrounds in software development and the Solana ecosystem. Elmoy shares his self-taught path in coding after transitioning from biology and finance, while Richard recounts his traditional education in computer science and his experiences in quantitative research at a hedge fund. The conversation highlights their diverse experiences and insights into the tech industry.
topic_summary: Elmoy and Richard from Tensor discuss their unique paths into software development, their experiences in the Solana ecosystem, and the importance of coding in their careers [t=39:10].
